gates.name: deterministic-candidate-summaries
gates.notes: scripted cut: all four summaries report 0.10.4; mandatory post-bump check passed (unit + e2e + coverage floors + canary + arch). Packet-creation reverification caught a stale launcher (an aborted post-cut session had rebuilt installDist as 0.10.3 at 22:03Z); rebuilt from the clean cut tree and reverified Talos 0.10.4 before any lane runs

gates.name: qodana-static-analysis
gates.notes: fresh native scan at packet creation on the clean working tree at the cut commit (operator-attested; the qodana.yaml-pinned 2026.1 linter, build 253.31821, no longer emits metaInformation.json/result-allProblems.json so the summary honestly reports qodana-provenance-incomplete and the SARIF carries no VCS provenance fields); 0 critical with failureConditions critical=0 enforced by the scan itself (exit 0); 113 findings (108 warning, 5 note) vs 88 at 0.10.3 - wave-3 surface growth plus linter build drift, no new critical families

gates.name: safe-redirected-gptoss
gates.notes: rerun required: wave 3 reworked the interactive rendering stack end to end; redirected transcripts must stay byte-identical plain (no ANSI, no markdown, no status row) and the forbidden approval-prompt substrings (byte-frozen via ApprovalPromptText since T765/T766) must hold on a live bank; scheduled in this close session from pwsh

gates.name: safe-redirected-qwen
gates.notes: rerun required (same rationale as the gptoss lane); 0.10.3 baseline: 19 PASS / 22 MANUAL_REQUIRED of 41, zero FAIL; scheduled in this close session from pwsh (never Windows PowerShell 5.1 - its stderr handling aborts the runner)

gates.name: sync-approval-gptoss
gates.notes: rerun required after the JLine 3.26.3->3.30.13 bump and the chrome-constants migration (T765-T768): scripted approval paths must keep their exact bytes live; seed 424242; 0.10.3 baseline 31/31 with 2 PASS_WITH_RUNTIME_REPAIR

gates.name: sync-approval-qwen
gates.notes: rerun required (same rationale); watch item: T763+T764 ride in this candidate - the 4 workspace-op scenarios that scored PASS with BLOCKED traces at 0.10.2/0.10.3 (phantom 'by' expected target) should now genuinely pass, and T764's outcome claim turns any remaining silent BLOCKED into a visible failure; seed 424242

gates.name: capability-private-mode-both-models
gates.notes: rerun required: streamed-answer shaping (T776 wrap, T777 markdown) sits on the answer path end to end even though it is interactive-only by activation predicate; verify zero secret/canary leaks, zero overclaims, and unchanged protected-read approvals on both models; OCR via the controlled stub

gates.name: true-pty-manual-qwen
gates.notes: REQUIRED, not carryable: every wave-3 ticket touches rendering. Owner must validate on a real terminal: streaming markdown styling (markers visible, colorize-only), nanorc-highlighted code fences, the JLine Status bottom row including resize behavior (3.30.13 fixed the duplication bug), width-reactive banner/answer pane/approval window (clamped 60-120), the wave-2 diff-bearing approval window at a non-default width, single-writer interleaving (no display corruption), and NO_COLOR/redirected degradation spot-checks; validator PASS + targeted canary scan PASS

gates.name: release-clean-canary-scan
gates.notes: runs over the live-lane artifact roots once the banks complete; the build-tree canary scan already passed in the post-bump check
